text.title: XP Extreme Programming Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema for the XP readiness checklist artefact. Scores each of the 12 practices and emits a phase recommendation.

example.code: { "artefact_id": "xp-faion-net", "team": "faion-net", "practices": { "tdd": {"score": 4, "evidence": "coverage 78%, tests-first policy in CONVENTIONS.md"}, "ci": {"score": 5, "evidence": "p50 CI 6m, auto-revert armed"}, "small_releases": {"score": 4, "evidence": "weekly cadence + on-demand hotfix"}, "refactor": {"score": 3, "evidence": "characterization-test-recipes adopted"}, "simple_design": {"score": 4, "evidence": "YAGNI rule enforced in code review"}, "pair_programming": {"score": 2, "evidence": "human+AI pair only; no human-human pair"}, "collective_ownership": {"score": 3, "evidence": "any-engineer-can-merge policy"}, "coding_standards": {"score": 5, "evidence": "ruff+ESLint enforced pre-commit"}, "metaphor": {"score": 2, "evidence": "no shared metaphor yet"}, "planning_game": {"score": 3, "evidence": "SDD batch planning at quarterly cadence"}, "on_site_customer": {"score": 2, "evidence": "PM async + weekly demo"}, "sustainable_pace": {"score": 4, "evidence": "no overtime policy; OOM caps in place"} }, "done_definition_wired": true, "phase": "phase-3-craft", "verdict": "phase-3", "version": "1.0.0", "last_reviewed": "2026-05-23" }

example.note: artefact_id missing xp- prefix; only 1 practice (need 12); score above max 5; phase-3 verdict despite substrate-missing; version + last_reviewed malformed.

antipattern.description: verdict=phase-3 with ANY of tdd / ci / small_releases score < 3.
antipattern.reason: r7 — substrate must be green before craft phase.
r6 — Done is the substrate-phase gate.
